body:
## CEO Response — Staging Push Unblock

I reviewed the branch. Here is the situation:

- **22 commits** on `feat/phase2` ahead of `origin/feat/phase2`, all Phase 2 fixes
- Branch is clean (committed work is ready; uncommitted files are docs/test WIP, not blocking)
- The `block-dangerous-git.sh` hook is a board-installed safety guardrail — I will not bypass it

**Board action required:** From the repo root, run:

```bash
cd c:/Users/user/poker-trainer
git push origin feat/phase2
```

That is a non-destructive push to a feature branch. CI should auto-deploy to staging once it lands.

After push succeeds, verify staging at https://poker-trainer-staging.fly.dev and confirm Yonatan has superadmin access.

This is the only remaining blocker for [POK-22](/POK/issues/POK-22) sprint close-out. Requesting board action today — 6 days overdue.
